entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary cereal crop evaluated for grain yields and income in Southern Mali

entities.name: SOUTHERN MALI
entities.description: The specific region in Mali where the on-farm trials were conducted

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the research was carried out

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of sorghum grain produced per hectare

entities.name: CASH INCOME
entities.description: The monetary revenue generated from sorghum production

entities.name: NET RETURNS
entities.description: The financial profit after accounting for production costs

entities.name: STOCHASTIC DOMINANCE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to compare the cumulative distributions of yields and income across treatments

entities.name: ON-FARM TRIALS
entities.description: The experimental method used to collect survey data from farmers' fields

entities.name: CONTROL TREATMENT
entities.description: The baseline production system without the addition of manure or mineral fertilizer

entities.name: MANURE
entities.description: The application of organic manure as a soil amendment

entities.name: MINERAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: The application of chemical mineral fertilizer as a soil amendment

entities.name: MANURE AND MINERAL FERTILIZER
entities.description: The combined application of both organic manure and chemical mineral fertilizer

entities.name: RISK-EFFICIENT CHOICE
entities.description: The decision-making process for selecting a production system based on risk and return

entities.name: AFRICA RISING PROJECT
entities.description: The project framework under which the sorghum production analysis was conducted
